description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The front features a prominent balcony above a covered entryway, with horizontal railings and steps leading up to the main door. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate one side of the house, providing ample natural light and a view into a spacious living area. The exterior is primarily smooth, light-colored concrete or stucco, with some sections featuring glass and metal accents. The rear and side elevations have a mix of smaller windows and solid wall sections, emphasizing privacy. The overall structure is boxy and angular, with clean lines and a focus on open, functional spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a minimalist, boxy design. The front features a balcony, covered entryway, and prominent use of concrete and glass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony, covered entryway with steps, and large glass windows on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the protruding glass room and a mix of small and large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with mostly solid walls, a few small windows, and the glass room extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing two upper windows, a large lower window, and the open rooftop sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, balcony above, and horizontal railings
